Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: With the Wet Eye entry opened, we can see that this radar has a maximum range of 150 nautical miles. This assumes best radar conditions and the helicopter with radar transmitter at maximum altitude.
In practice, range for this radar when used in real world conditions and not at max altitude will be lower. A good estimate will be somewhere around 100 nautical miles.
With this in mind, let's order our Ka-27PL to fly south from our ships. This will maximize the searchable area.
